authentication.recommendedStorage: Vapi custom credential, not inline prompt text

tools.name: matchDoctorBySymptoms
tools.description: Match the patient's symptoms to the most appropriate doctor or department for appointment routing only. This tool must not diagnose.

symptoms.description: The patient's symptoms in their own words.

tools.name: checkAvailability
tools.description: Check available appointment slots for a doctor on a requested date. If the requested date has no slots, use next_available_dates and handoff_recommended to offer a safer next step.

date.description: Requested appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: bookAppointment
tools.description: Book an appointment after the patient explicitly confirms the doctor, date, and time.

phone.description: Patient phone number, preferably in international format.

start_time.description: Appointment start time in HH:mm 24-hour format.

reason.description: Short appointment reason from the patient.

vapi_call_id.description: Vapi call ID when available, used for idempotency.

tools.name: endOfCall
tools.description: Save call summary metadata after the call ends. Store transcript only if consent and retention policy allow it.
